channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto Fund Manager CoinShares Begins Trading on Nasdaq via SPAC Deal
item.description: European crypto asset manager CoinShares positions for U.S. expansion as institutional players consolidate market share against Wall Street giants.

item.title: Crypto rebounds as oil dips on Trump comments, but derivatives signal weak conviction
item.description: Bitcoin and ether rise alongside altcoins, yet muted open interest suggests the rally may rely on spot demand and short covering rather than strong leverage.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post first monthly inflows since October as price stabilizes
item.description: ETF AUM fell just 7% from the October highs, highlighting resilience despite a 50% price decline.

item.title: Uniswap Foundation held $85.8M at year-end, committed $26M in grants during 2025
item.description: Unaudited financials show the DeFi protocol's foundation had runway through January 2027 before the UNIfication governance overhaul passed in late December.

item.title: DOJ Charges 10 Foreign Nationals Over Crypto ‘Wash Trading’ Scheme
item.description: Federal grand juries have indicted ten individuals tied to alleged pump-and-dump schemes, following an FBI undercover operation.

item.title: Fed’s Barr invokes Panic of 1907 in warning on stablecoin rules
item.description: US Fed Governor Michael Barr said clearer US rules could help the market grow, but warned that GENIUS Act implementation must still guard against runs, weak reserves and illicit finance.

item.title: US crypto wash trading case reaches court as 3 extradited, 10 charged
item.description: Extraditions of executives from market makers Vortex, Contrarian, Gotbit and Antier mark the latest step in a multi‑agency effort targeting alleged “market‑manipulation‑as‑a‑service.”

item.title: Here's why bitcoin's parabolic era may be over
item.description: Bitcoin’s price retraces to old highs, signaling slower growth and a maturing market.

item.title: Crypto asset manager CoinShares to list on Nasdaq after $1.2 billion SPAC deal
item.description: The listing makes CoinShares the latest crypto firm to go public and follows similar moves by BitGo, Circle, Bullish, and Gemini in recent years.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post $1.3B in March inflows, first monthly gain of 2026
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs ended Q1 in the red, with about $500 million of net outflows despite March inflows, as sentiment remained weak amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Strategy's STRC keeps dividend payout steady at 11.5% after seven straight increases
item.description: The perpetual preferred yield holds at 11.5% for April as the 30-day volume weighted average price stabilizes near $100.

item.title: Australia passes crypto regulation requiring exchanges to obtain financial services licenses
item.description: Exchanges and custody platforms must obtain financial services licenses within six months under the new framework.

item.title: Bitcoin’s drawdown is ‘less dramatic’ this cycle, Fidelity says
item.description: A shallower Bitcoin drawdown than previous cycles "indicates a maturing market with reduced volatility and stronger institutional confidence," said Nick Ruck, director of LVRG Research.

item.title: Dorsey shares AI-integrated workplace vision weeks after Block’s 40% staff cut
item.description: Block cut 4,000 of its staff in February as part of its AI-driven pivot. A new post by Block's Jack Dorsey has shed light on how the company and others might operate in the future.

item.title: Some quantum-resistant tokens jump 50% as Google flags risks to Bitcoin security
item.description: The so-called quantum-resistant coins rally as traders switch to potential long-term security.

item.title: CFTC’s top enforcer puts prediction market insider traders on notice
item.description: “There’s a myth in mainstream media and social media that insider trading doesn’t apply in the prediction markets … That is wrong,” said CFTC enforcement director David Miller.

item.title: E-commerce giant Mercado Libre to sunset rewards-based Mercado Coin: Report
item.description: The closure of Mercado Coin doesn't mark the end of Mercado Libre's crypto rewards strategy as it still offers the Meli Dolar (MUSD), a US dollar stablecoin which launched in 2024.

item.title: These catalysts could bump bitcoin as Trump hands three-week target to end Iran war
item.description: Asian stocks surged 4% and S&P 500 futures jumped after Trump said the conflict could conclude without a deal with Tehran, while Morgan Stanley's newly approved bitcoin ETF at 14 basis points opens a $6.2 trillion advisory channel.

item.title: XRP holds $1.34 as supply tightens but price fails to break higher
item.description: Record outflows and rising scarcity suggest accumulation, yet failure to break higher keeps setup unresolved.

item.title: New Hampshire’s Bitcoin-backed bond gets Moody's rating
item.description: Moody's assigned a provisional Ba2 rating to New Hampshire’s bond project, placing it below investment grade, as it cited Bitcoin’s volatility.

item.title: Researchers say quantum computers could, in theory, be ready by 2030
item.description: New research from Caltech and Oratomic, a Caltech-linked startup, says quantum computers of the future may be closer to reality.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇲🇹🇪🇺 Malta says EU's crypto regulation plans will push firms away to US, UAE, & Asia. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9SZjI0blEwdzJMcUJ1RWhXcTRwSFZEMVkyNFp3ZHVCbjRjUm93OWpVZ2ppcFVTZTV0VVc1Rk45RFVyUVB2aHoyR1ZWdG14MDN6M3AyTWkwR0NGdXZHMy1pTGFR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇲🇹🇪🇺 Malta says EU's …

item.title: FUN FACT: 13 years ago today, Bitcoin reached $100 for the first time. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9GRF9TZTFqdHhMNngyaFhhclRwMzF2OXBCOE4zUUtoVXc0RWlqVzlzVHV2YXlHdWlUd1FTYjZONlo5bzNsRHZwRDRvREk3cVpyZlJpbVZzRkVhSE9SdUgybDNB?oc=5" target="_blank">FUN FACT: 13 years ago today, Bitc…

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: US DOJ charges 10 foreign nationals across four crypto firms for running pump-and-dump schemes on cryptocurrency markets. Three executives, including two CEOs, were arrested and extradited from Singapore to face trial. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8tVHQ1M19VN3dTSklzd1VVX1E1c2lZby0yb2dYd1lxdWM4UTB6QlMtZFVCNW1ONjZVUXN3UnVZZkxSVmVrY2tfWDNMMndPajlaM21Ld3RKc0pXbjhCV3UxYlJGVG4?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: US DOJ charges 10 fo…

item.title: 🔥 BIG: Arizona's crypto bills clear the House Rules Committee, putting them on a fast track to a full House vote. SB1042 would allow state funds to invest up to 10% in crypto, while SB1649 would establish a digital assets reserve fund. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE02R2RqYVJudmlGQTgzUC16ME1nc3lET1JFZUFzdFgtWFFON2tWVGxYRlZmdFRrQmwzSTNRMUkzVDRjNWVlVi1mVHFsZVc1NVpHZjE0WXZvdjc5cE5xSmZQNlZtTk4?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: Arizona's crypto bills …

item.title: Hong Kong hasn’t issued a single HKD stablecoin license after March target
item.description: Officials flagged March for initial approvals, but licensing has yet to begin with no updated timeline

item.title: Bitcoin is closer to its 'buy zone' than it's been in three years
item.description: The gap between bitcoin's spot price and realized price is compressing toward levels that historically marked cycle bottoms, but the on-chain data shows the capitulation that typically precedes those bottoms hasn't happened.

item.title: Bitfarms loss widened to $285M as Bitcoin fell, but shares jump anyway
item.description: Bitfarms said it was impacted by a decline in Bitcoin prices last year. The company is now five months into its pivot from Bitcoin mining to HPC and AI.

item.title: Solana DEX volumes drop to 2024 lows: Will SOL hold $80 as support?
item.description: Solana’s declining DEX volumes raise the likelihood of a SOL price correction to $75, but the network’s DApp revenue highlights its resilience.

item.title: Watch Out Bitcoin: Cryptography-Breaking Quantum Computers May Be Closer Than Expected, Says Caltech
item.description: Research suggests fault-tolerant quantum machines could arrive sooner than expected, posing a threat to Bitcoin and Ethereum cryptography.

item.title: Bitcoin, stocks soar as markets respond to chance of US and Israel-Iran war ending
item.description: Bitcoin held above $68,000 as investors reacted to signs Trump may seek a quicker end to the Iran war, though traders remain cautious.

item.title: Bitcoin enters the public bond market as Moody’s gives a first-of-its-kind crypto deal a rating
item.description: A New Hampshire state authority is set to issue a first-of-its-kind bitcoin-backed bond with a Ba2 rating, marking an early test of how crypto can function as collateral inside traditional public finance markets.

item.title: Donald Trump says US will leave Iran within 2 to 3 weeks
item.description: The conflict in Iran has been escalating following US and Israeli strikes against Iran in February, which sent oil prices higher and crypto and broader markets tumbling.

item.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index stuck on ‘extreme fear,’ but is there a silver lining?
item.description: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index remains pinned in the "extreme fear" zone, but Bitcoin’s lengthy consolidation phase above the $60,000 support may be a positive sign.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Texas Lt. Gov. calls for study of crypto, prediction markets
item.description: The #2 Texas state official called on lawmakers to study “the sudden inundation of prediction market gambling“ as other jurisdictions take the platforms to court.

item.title: Wall Street moves benchmarks onchain as S&P tokenizes Treasurys index
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices puts its iBoxx US Treasuries Index on the Canton Network, allowing institutions to access bond benchmark data through tokens rather than feeds.

item.title: Crypto Startup Uses Polymarket to Bet on Its Own Fundraise, Blindsiding Backers
item.description: P2P.me was established to push boundaries, but the startup admitted that wagering on itself via Polymarket may have been a bridge too far.

item.title: If You Hold Solana on Magic Eden's Wallet, It's Time to Move It or Lose It
item.description: Support for Magic Eden's crypto wallet is ending soon, meaning users will have to export their private keys to avoid losing access to funds.

item.title: California Tightens AI Contract Rules as Fight With Trump Admin Grows
item.description: Governor Gavin Newsom orders stronger safeguards for AI companies seeking California contracts, escalating tensions with the Trump administration over national AI regulation.

item.title: What's next after bitcoin's historic underperformance stretch against stocks
item.description: With a few hours to go, bitcoin has tumbled 22% in the first quarter, following a 25% drop in the last quarter of 2025.

item.title: Chainalysis to add ‘blockchain intelligence’ agents to platform
item.description: The analytics platform said it would begin rolling out the agents over the summer for use in investigations and compliance.

item.title: Latin America’s Mercado Libre Pulls the Plug on Its Crypto Coin
item.description: Latin America's e-commerce giant Mercado Libre quietly killed its Mercado Coin loyalty token—pivoting to its own stablecoin.

item.title: Zcash Vulnerability That Put Millions of Dollars of ZEC at Risk Has Been Fixed
item.description: A critical vulnerability in Zcash node software could have allowed attackers to drain millions of dollars of ZEC from a deprecated shielded pool.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $68K but BTC futures, macro data show traders remain bearish
item.description: Bitcoin rallied to $68,000 as markets responded positively to the prospect of the US and Israel-Iran war ending, but data shows futures traders are not convinced.

item.title: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading for retail investors in Europe
item.description: Brokerage clients in the European Economic Area can now trade 11 cryptocurrencies alongside traditional assets in a single account.

item.title: Bitcoin, Crypto Stocks Climb on Reports That Iran's President Is 'Ready to End War'
item.description: Stocks are surging while Bitcoin and Ethereum hit their highest prices in days after Iran's president said he's looking to end the conflict.

item.title: Clarity Act ‘not a gatekeeper’ for crypto innovation, WisdomTree exec says
item.description: The asset manager says innovation can proceed under current SEC rules as the Clarity Act faces debate in Congress.

item.title: Tether's USAT Stablecoin Expands Beyond Ethereum Mainnet to Celo
item.description: The Tether-backed USAT stablecoin built for the U.S. market is expanding to Ethereum layer-2 network Celo with help from Google Cloud.

item.title: The post-quantum transition can’t be postponed any longer
item.description: Google’s new research potentially puts the entire bitcoin supply – and the very foundation of digital trust – at risk, explains Pruden.

item.title: Anthropic Accidentally Leaked Claude Code's Source—The Internet Is Keeping It Forever
item.description: Claude Code exposed: Anthropic is scrambling to contain the leak, but the AI coding agent is spreading far and wide and being picked apart.

item.title: Stablecoin Market to Hit $2 Trillion in 2028 Even as Velocity Doubles: Standard Chartered
item.description: Standard Chartered says stablecoin velocity has doubled in two years, driven by USDC's new use cases in TradFi and AI payments.

item.title: Bitcoin, stocks rise, oil slides, after report of Iran's willingness to end conflict
item.description: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian said the country is prepared to end the conflict if it receives security guarantees.

item.title: I mentioned this last year on @theallinpod and the crypto bros freaked out. Two things are true about crypto bros: they are extremely technical and extremely belief oriented. Sometimes, though, the latter clouds the former. This paper from Google, though, is qui - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5NMzdBSGFaTi1qZldrR2hoQkZNbTdRcGpKZ091N2xoc3ZLUzlwTkQ1WVFPMnQyYWhMN1Mwc0NvMDRleVpET0N4VkFMYmVBbjhrTzR1Ukd3UGRtNDkz?oc=5" target="_blank">I mentioned this last year on @theallinpod…

item.title: 'Massive Disruptive Potential': Benchmark Initiates Securitize Coverage With Buy Rating
item.description: The BlackRock-backed firm has a clear path toward pressuring financial incumbents, according Benchmark’s Mark Palmer.

item.title: Charles Hoskinson not a fan of CLARITY Act, warns of 'weaponization' by future lawmakers
item.description: The Cardano founder says post-FTX politics, flawed design and a narrow U.S.-only approach risk stifling new crypto projects while benefiting established players

item.title: Why 12 European banks are teaming up to save the euro from digital dollarization
item.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, the CEO of a 12-member consortium explains why Europe is racing to put the euro onchain and compete with dollar dominance in crypto markets.

item.title: The time for clear financial privacy rules is now
item.description: Despite recent regulatory progress in the industry, privacy remains an area that needs to be addressed, says Yelderman.

item.title: Nakamoto Shares Hit New Low After Bitcoin Treasury Firm Sells Off BTC
item.description: Shares in publicly traded Bitcoin treasury Nakamoto (NAKA) hit a new low after the firm announced it sold around $20 million of BTC.

item.title: US Users Barred From KuCoin After $500K CFTC Settlement
item.description: A federal court order has permanently prohibited the exchange from serving U.S. customers unless it registers.
